scenes.name: Land on Slide Builder
scenes.note: Let the viewer take in the two-pane layout: markdown editor on the left, live preview on the right, with templates across the top.

scenes.name: Name the deck
scenes.note: Replace the generic title to show the deck is editable and branded instantly.

scenes.name: Observe updated title
scenes.note: Notice the deck title field is now personalized, framing the presentation before we change the content.

scenes.name: Rewrite markdown with concise demo content
scenes.note: Swap the seeded markdown for a clean three-slide product story so the preview refresh demonstrates the core workflow.

scenes.name: Observe live preview refresh
scenes.note: Notice the preview updates from markdown automatically without any save button.

scenes.name: Try the Terminal template
scenes.note: Switch to a dramatically different theme to show that the same content can be restyled instantly.

scenes.name: Observe Terminal styling
scenes.note: Look for the phosphor-green terminal aesthetic taking over the preview while the markdown stays unchanged.

scenes.name: Try the Magazine template
scenes.note: Show a second visual direction to emphasize the six-template gallery.

scenes.name: Observe Magazine styling
scenes.note: Notice the editorial serif treatment and how the deck takes on a press-ready feel.

scenes.name: Return to Council Signal
scenes.note: Settle back on the household house-style theme for the final hero view.

scenes.name: Observe house style preview
scenes.note: The viewer should notice the ember-accented Council Signal theme re-establishing the polished final look.

scenes.name: Hover export button
scenes.note: Call attention to the one-file HTML export without triggering a download during the demo.
